author: Valentina Ablaev
title: Avocado Toast (Topping ideas and Tips)
instructions_list: Toast the bread slices until reached desired crispiness.
Remove the pit from the avocado. Scoop out the avocado and add to a bowl. Mash the avocado until chunky or smooth.
Add the avocado spread to the toasted bread and top with everything bagel seasoning and desired toppings.
description: A classic avocado toast recipe that is simple, healthy and so GOOD! The best avocado toast topped with different toppings.
